name: WelderMR
summary: Leverage the power of Meta Quest 3 to master the fundamentals of welding. WelderMR utilizes high-fidelity hand-tracking for fast, efficient immersion that stays true to professional techniques.  - Preparation: Safety protocols and equipment procedures.  - Handling: Torch grip and work angle mastery.  - Technique: Learning deposition movements and travel speed control.  A secure, precise, and waste-free pedagogical solution.
